privacy.title: NexTaxi Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At NexTaxi, we take your privacy seriously. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your data when you use our app and transportation services.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
paragraphs: This Privacy Policy applies to the NexTaxi mobile application, website, and related services (collectively, the "Services"). By using NexTaxi, you agree to the practices described in this policy.
If you do not agree with this Privacy Policy, we recommend that you stop using our Services.

sections.title: 2. Data We Collect
paragraphs: We collect information to provide you with a safe, reliable, and personalized transportation service. The types of data we may collect include:
- Account data: first name, last name, email address, phone number, preferred language.
- Trip data: pickup and drop-off locations, routes, trip dates and times, trip history.
- Payment data: payment method, partial card information (handled by external payment providers), amounts and receipts.
- Device data: device model, operating system, device identifiers, IP address, app version.
- Usage data: interactions with the app, clicks, visited screens, configuration preferences.

sections.title: 3. Location Data
paragraphs: NexTaxi uses location data to match you with nearby drivers, calculate routes, and display estimated arrival times.
We may collect your precise location while the app is in use and, in some cases, in the background, as long as you have allowed it in your device settings.
You can disable location access from your device settings, but this may affect the functionality of the Services.

sections.title: 4. How We Use Your Data
paragraphs: We use your data to:
- Provide and maintain the Services, including managing bookings and trips.
- Process payments and send invoices and receipts.
- Enhance user and driver safety, detect fraud, and prevent misuse.
- Provide customer support and respond to inquiries.
- Analyze service performance and improve the user experience.
- Send you trip-related notifications, important service updates, and, where permitted, promotional communications.

sections.title: 5. Legal Basis for Processing
paragraphs: We process your personal data on the following legal bases:
- Performance of a contract: when it is necessary to provide you with the transportation service.
- Legitimate interest: to improve safety, prevent fraud, and optimize our Services.
- Consent: for certain features, such as marketing communications or background location usage.
- Legal obligations: when we are required by law to retain or share certain information.

sections.title: 6. How We Share Your Information
paragraphs: We do not sell your personal data. We may share your information only with:
- Drivers: data necessary to complete the trip (name, pickup location, approximate destination).
- Payment providers: to securely process transactions.
- Infrastructure and analytics providers: who help us operate, maintain, and improve the platform.
- Competent authorities: when required by law or to protect the rights, safety, or integrity of users, drivers, or NexTaxi.

sections.title: 7. Data Security
paragraphs: We implement reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, loss, misuse, or disclosure.
However, no system is completely secure. While we strive to protect your information, we cannot guarantee absolute security.

sections.title: 8. Data Retention
paragraphs: We retain your personal data for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this Privacy Policy, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law.
When we no longer need your data, we will delete or anonymize it in a secure manner.

sections.title: 9. Your Rights
paragraphs: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to:
- Access the personal data we hold about you.
- Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
- Request deletion of your personal data in certain circumstances.
- Object to certain processing or request restriction of processing.
- Withdraw your consent where processing is based on consent.
You can exercise these rights by contacting us through the channels indicated in this policy.

sections.title: 10. Cookies and Similar Technologies
paragraphs: NexTaxi may use cookies and similar technologies to remember your preferences, understand how you use the app, and improve performance.
You can manage your cookie preferences from your browser or device settings, although some features may be affected.

sections.title: 11. Children
paragraphs: Our Services are not directed to individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children.
If we become aware that we have collected data from a child without appropriate consent, we will take steps to delete such information.

sections.title: 12. Changes to This Policy
paragraphs: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in law, our Services, or our data practices.
We will post the updated version in the app and on the website, indicating the date of the latest update.

sections.title: 13. Contact Us
paragraphs: If you have questions, concerns, or wish to exercise your data protection rights, you can contact NexTaxi at:
Email: privacy@nextaxi.app
Please include "Privacy Inquiry" in the subject line so we can respond more quickly.

terms.title: NexTaxi Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your access to and use of the NexTaxi application and related services. By using the platform, you agree to these terms.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
paragraphs: By registering or using NexTaxi, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to these Terms of Service.
If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must stop using the platform.

sections.title: 2. Service Description
paragraphs: NexTaxi is a platform that connects passengers with independent drivers to facilitate urban transportation services.
NexTaxi is not a transportation company; trips are performed by independent drivers using the platform.

sections.title: 3. User Account
paragraphs: To use NexTaxi, you must create an account with accurate and up-to-date information.
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials.
You must be at least 18 years old to use the platform.

sections.title: 4. User Conduct
paragraphs: You agree to use the platform responsibly and respectfully.
You may not:
• Use the app for illegal activities.
• Harass, threaten, or endanger drivers or passengers.
• Manipulate fares, routes, or payment systems.
• Create multiple accounts without authorization.

sections.title: 5. Driver Conduct
paragraphs: Drivers must comply with local transportation laws, maintain their vehicles in safe condition, and treat passengers respectfully.
NexTaxi may suspend or deactivate drivers who violate these requirements.

sections.title: 6. Payments and Fees
paragraphs: Fares are calculated based on distance, time, and demand.
Payments are processed securely through external providers.
NexTaxi may apply additional charges for late cancellations or vehicle damage.

sections.title: 7. Cancellations
paragraphs: You may cancel a trip before the driver arrives at the pickup location.
Late or repeated cancellations may incur additional fees.
Drivers may also cancel a trip if the passenger does not show up.

sections.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: NexTaxi does not guarantee continuous availability of the service.
We are not responsible for delays, cancellations, accidents, or damages caused by independent drivers.
NexTaxi’s liability is limited to the maximum extent permitted by law.

sections.title: 9. Account Suspension or Termination
paragraphs: NexTaxi may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms or if suspicious activity is detected.
You may request account deletion at any time.

sections.title: 10. Updates to the Terms
paragraphs: NexTaxi may update these Terms of Service to reflect legal or service changes.
The updated version will be published in the app and on the website.

sections.title: 11. Contact Us
paragraphs: If you have questions about these terms, you can contact us at:
Email: support@nextaxi.app
